74809.subject: 😱 Saylor's STRC collapses
74809.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $62,614 (-2.0%) | **ETH** $1,693 (-2.7%) | **SOL** $68 (-3.6%)

* STRC falls[ as low as $82](https://x.com/Croesus_BTC/status/2067643944016486751?s=20) before recovering back over $88 — ==Saylor admits using AI to develop ==[STRC](https://x.com/CoinDesk/status/2067670392911667278)

* US Hormuz blockade ends after [deal with ](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595)[Iran](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067589619055554595) gets signed — Pentagon asks for [$80B for Iran war costs](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2067792361288273975?s=20) — Vance [postpones trip](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067800227550003295?s=20) to Switzerland for Iran talks

* Bitcoin falls below $63k as over $180M [gets liquidated](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2067640231575134453) — BTC ETFs see over [$90M in net daily outflows](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067822912619614439?s=20)

* Franklin Templeton files for ETF that reinvests [stock dividends into BTC](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2067909471435685965?s=20)

* ==Intel gains ==[9%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067587418451001844)== on rumors of Apple chip deal==

* Co-director of the Ethereum foundation [steps down](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067625555613090229?s=20) — Foundation could face [funding crisis](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2067800928343003267?s=20) in 3-9 months

* Kraken integrates [Solana DEX trading](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067618291422572589?s=20) into its core app

* Solana perp DEX Phoenix Trade’s open interest hits new [ATH of $8.8M](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2067792393827443191?s=20)

* US homebuilding hits 5 year low after dropping [15.4%](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2067374478632308965)

* 50k [agentic trading accounts](https://x.com/tokens/status/2067811839090864454?s=20) have been opened on Robinhoo

* ==Rockstar opens pre-orders for ==[GTA 6](https://x.com/RockstarGames/status/2067594067030979053)== on June 25==

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading a plain text version of this post. For the best experience, copy and paste this link in your browser to view the post online:
https://www.dailybones.com/p/saylor-s-strc-collapses

Fear and Greed is at
19
(Extreme
Fear)
and BTC is at
$63K
this morning. The trigger: the Fed's hawkish hold on June 17
strengthened the dollar, and that pressure compounded today when
Israel struck Lebanon despite the recently signed US-Iran peace
deal. Total market cap has slipped to $2.16T, near the yearly
low.

Around $580 million was liquidated market-wide as the selloff
cascaded. Against that backdrop, this week's accountability
stories matter even more.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

Stablecoin Issuers Will Soon Need to Verify Your ID

Five federal regulators proposed a rule this week requiring
stablecoin issuers to collect a name, address, birth date, and ID
number before opening an account, mirroring decades-old bank
rules.

The requirement only applies when customers interact directly
with issuers. Exchange trades and wallet transfers fall outside
its reach.

Why did Fed Chair Kevin Warsh abstain from voting on this rule?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/jM3xhCTP-Oqdx-T4y50sCA~~/AAQRxRA~/vHMqdB6IFwGvW39Dy-Dwk1BRzJjoimkhtifd62Db3gIKJQGmpEu9t6zuurZySFgRfRF82AJXRUMjLfjT-F8EljNxLF5LRIoeIi-vs9HLgfAPTeRC-smmcuLmn3VkCsykfkvhlRvkClPqtn14ctnyQ4qXwKmZ0ST4ssCLZphnvn1tfyy8PFT4tyAQDxQC3Nfu_t4LETTrXTi-qBk8jhYVQTG-CEZSI4iPpKIYxN2yC6c~ )
   A Crypto Lending CEO Is Now Banned From Trading for Life

The CFTC permanently banned former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky
